description_long: This is a tall, slender metal pole supporting a rectangular street sign at the top. The sign is black with white text and a directional arrow, indicating a street name and direction. The pole is simple and utilitarian, with no decorative elements or additional attachments. The sign is mounted perpendicular to the pole, with the arrow pointing to the right when viewed from the front. The surface of the pole and sign appears smooth and painted, likely to resist weathering. The overall design is typical for urban street signage, providing clear wayfinding information.
description: A tall black metal pole with a rectangular street sign displaying a street name and a right-pointing arrow in white.
description_view_0: The pole is seen from the side, showing the thin profile of the sign and a partial view of the arrow symbol.
description_view_1: The front view displays the full street sign with the street name and a right-pointing arrow clearly visible.
description_view_2: The pole is viewed from the opposite side, showing the edge of the sign and the arrow symbol from the side.
description_view_3: The back of the sign is visible, with the arrow pointing left and no text readable.
